segments.text:
Stop
Look at your hands
The mirror is lying to you today
Heavy water
Drowning out the truth
You were woven in a secret place
Come home
Give it up
Lay the burden down right now
Leave the mask
Let the makeup run
I see you
I know you
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
Wash the clay away
Find the soul beneath the clay
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
Turn back
Just turn back
Give it up
Turn back
Cold
Surgical steel
Cannot fix what isn't broken
Hollow promise
Empty words
He loved you before you spoke
Before the pills
Before the change
Run back
Run fast
Run until you find the start
Mercy waits
Mercy wins
Mercy holds the key
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
Wash the clay away
Find the soul beneath the clay
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
Come back to the garden
Come back to the light
Come back to the truth
Leave the shadows behind
Leave the pretend behind
Leave the struggle behind
Everything is new
Everything is true
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
Wash the clay away
Find the soul beneath the clay
He is calling you by your old name
He is calling you by your old name
Turn back
Just turn back
Give it up
Turn back
By your name
By your name
Turn back
